VAL-CLI-002.title: Help and discoverability coverage

steps.expected: Lists run, info, report, upload commands
steps.observed: Commands section lists: run, info, report, upload — all present
Options section shows: --compute-only, --memory-only, --interconnect-only, --output/-o PATH, --upload — all scope/selective-run flags and output path options present

evidence.terminal_output_help: Usage: ornn-bench [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]... Commands: run, info, report, upload. Exit code 0.
evidence.terminal_output_run_help: Usage: ornn-bench run [OPTIONS]. Options: --compute-only, --memory-only, --interconnect-only, --output/-o PATH, --upload, --help. Exit code 0.

VAL-CLI-002.reason: All four commands (run, info, report, upload) listed in --help. Run --help documents all scope flags (--compute-only, --memory-only, --interconnect-only) and output path option (-o/--output).

VAL-CLI-003.title: Environment info diagnostics

steps.action: Run `ornn-bench info` on macOS without NVIDIA GPU
steps.expected: Shows system info (OS, kernel, CPU), GPU section with missing-GPU remediation, Python section, benchmark tools section with remediation
steps.observed: System section: OS=Darwin 25.3.0, Kernel=25.3.0, CPU=Apple M4. GPU section: 'nvidia-smi not found on PATH' with remediation 'Install NVIDIA GPU drivers. On Ubuntu: sudo apt install nvidia-driver-535.' Python section: Python 3.14.0, PyTorch not installed. Benchmark Tools table: nvidia-smi (missing, with link), nvbandwidth (missing, with build instructions), nccl-tests (missing, with build instructions). Exit code 0.

evidence.terminal_output: System: OS=Darwin 25.3.0, Kernel=25.3.0, CPU=Apple M4. GPU: nvidia-smi not found, remediation provided. Python: 3.14.0, PyTorch not installed. Benchmark Tools: nvidia-smi ✗ missing, nvbandwidth ✗ missing, nccl-tests ✗ missing — each with actionable remediation text and URLs.

VAL-CLI-003.reason: Info command displays system info (OS, kernel, CPU), GPU status with actionable remediation for missing nvidia-smi, Python version/PyTorch status, and benchmark tools table with per-tool remediation instructions and links.

VAL-CLI-010.title: No-GPU run guardrail

steps.action: Run `ornn-bench run` on macOS without NVIDIA GPU
steps.expected: Exits with code 1, shows clear 'No NVIDIA GPU Detected' message with guidance, no Python traceback
steps.observed: Exits with code 1. Displays bordered panel titled 'No NVIDIA GPU Detected' with explanation: 'nvidia-smi not found on PATH', 3-step remediation (NVIDIA GPU, drivers, CUDA toolkit), cloud instance hint, and pointers to 'ornn-bench info' and 'ornn-bench report'. No Python traceback in output.

evidence.terminal_output: Panel: 'No NVIDIA GPU Detected' — 'No NVIDIA GPU detected: nvidia-smi not found on PATH.' Guidance: 1) A machine with an NVIDIA GPU, 2) NVIDIA drivers installed, 3) CUDA toolkit installed. Cloud instance hint. Links to driver guide. Suggests 'ornn-bench info' and 'ornn-bench report <file>'.

VAL-CLI-010.reason: CLI exits with code 1, displays a clear 'No NVIDIA GPU Detected' panel with actionable remediation steps, and produces no Python traceback.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed. VAL-CLI-002 (help coverage), VAL-CLI-003 (environment info diagnostics), and VAL-CLI-010 (no-GPU guardrail) all behave as specified.
